brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: The split-panel Us-vs-Them format naturally positions coffee as the problem and Organica Tulsi Green Tea as the calm, healthier solution for people already considering a switch.
copyOptions.visual_description: Split-panel flat-lay on a light neutral background: left panel has a cool light grey background featuring a plain generic white coffee mug or instant coffee tin to represent the old habit, right panel has a warm cream off-white background showcasing the Organica Tulsi Green Tea product packaging as the hero. Soft diffused studio lighting with no harsh shadows, muted grey and warm cream color palette with subtle green accents, both products centered at a slight three-quarter angle for clean product focus.
subheadlines: No jitters. No crash. Just calm, clean energy from nature.
Steady energy all day. Zero anxiety. One simple swap.
Ancient tulsi wisdom. Modern calm. Ditch the coffee crash.
